archetype: Swiss & High-Contrast (Dark Forensic Command Center Variant)
core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Combine Datadog-level data density with cinematic Vercel-style marketing.
Emotion First: Evoke 'Command and Control'. Users must feel powerful and secure.
Zoom in: Emphasize micro-interactions and raw data (live code blocks, active scoring numbers) as hero art.
Negative Space: Use deep black voids to frame high-intensity data and glowing accents.

hierarchy.h1: font-heading text-5xl md:text-6xl font-extrabold tracking-tighter leading-tight text-white
hierarchy.h2: font-heading text-3xl md:text-4xl font-extrabold tracking-tight leading-snug text-white
hierarchy.h3: font-heading text-2xl md:text-3xl font-bold tracking-tight text-white

motion.preloader: framer-motion: initial opacity 1, exit opacity 0, duration 0.8. SVG path drawing for PoH logo + typing effect for 'INITIALIZING TRUST PROTOCOL...'
motion.scroll_reveal: framer-motion: initial { y: 40, opacity: 0 }, whileInView { y: 0, opacity: 1 }, viewport { once: true, margin: '-100px' }
motion.staggered_list: framer-motion variants for container (staggerChildren: 0.1) and items (y: 20, opacity: 0 -> y: 0, opacity: 1)
motion.data_stream: framer-motion: continuous translateY to simulate flowing logs, looping seamlessly

Home.Preloader: Full screen black. IBM Plex Mono text typing 'PoH INTELLIGENCE: ACTIVE'. Progress bar loads to 100%, screen slides up.
Home.Nav: Sticky glassmorphism header. Logo left. Links center. Login (ghost) + Create Account (primary solid) right.
Home.Hero: Split layout. Left: H1 'The trust & fraud intelligence layer for paid traffic.', body, CTAs. Right: Animated 'Live Scoring Engine' visual - a dark terminal window showing JSON payloads streaming, with a glowing green trust score gauge updating in real-time.
Home.SocialProof: Marquee of trusted company logos (low opacity white).
Home.ProblemBento: Grid highlighting 'Wasted Ad Spend' (red chart), 'Bot Traffic' (yellow warning), 'Fake Leads' (code snippet).
Home.Features: Alternating side-by-side rows detailing 'Detect', 'Observe', 'Block'. Accompanying UI abstractions.
Home.Stats: Large number counters (e.g., '$1.2B Ad Spend Protected') using react-countup.
Home.Footer: Large 'Start Protecting Your Traffic' CTA. Sitemap links, social icons, status indicator.

Products.Architecture: Diagram showing the PoH.js SDK data flow -> Analysis Engine -> Customer Dashboard.
Products.SDK_Section: Code block component showing how easy it is to install the script. Features syntax highlighting (IBM Plex Mono).
Products.Capabilities_Grid: Bento grid detailing Session Intelligence, Conversion Authenticity, and Rules Engine.

Pricing.Tiers: 3 Cards: Starter (Startups), Growth (Agencies), Enterprise (Custom). Enterprise card features subtle tracing beam border.
Pricing.FAQ: Accordion component (shadcn) for common billing questions.

About.Story: Rich text narrative on why PoH was built.
About.Team: Grid of professional portraits with hover grayscale-to-color transition.
About.Values: 3-column grid of core values (Transparency, Speed, Accuracy).

Resources.Featured: Large hero card for the latest report.
Resources.Grid: 3-column grid of blog cards with tags, dates, and 'Read More' links.
Resources.Newsletter: Inline form component to subscribe to threat alerts.

Support.SystemStatus: Card showing 'All Systems Operational' with a pulsing green dot.

components.Card: bg-surface border border-default rounded-2xl p-8 hover:border-hover transition-colors relative overflow-hidden

StatusBadge.secure: bg-primary_glow text-primary border border-primary/30 px-2 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-mono
StatusBadge.fraud: bg-[#F87171]/20 text-[#F87171] border border-[#F87171]/30 px-2 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-mono

abstract_hero_bg.description: Dynamic abstract blue light patterns for hero backgrounds.

abstract_tech_texture.description: Vivid abstract 3D render with futuristic geometric shapes, ideal for feature sections.

team_portrait_1.description: Business professionals in modern office, use for About page.

team_portrait_2.description: Business professionals walking in city, use for About page team/culture.

instructions_to_main_agent: You MUST use Framer Motion for the Preloader and page scroll reveals. The preloader is explicitly requested by the user.
The UI strictly follows a 'Dark Forensic' command-center aesthetic. Do not introduce light-mode styles. Background is #08090A, Surface is #121417.
Extensively use 'IBM Plex Mono' for any data points, stats, JSON payloads, or status badges to reinforce the developer-focused forensic brand.
Implement the 'data_stream' and 'StatusBadge' components to create a 'Live Scoring' feel in the Hero section.
Use Lucide React or Phosphor Icons for iconography, ensuring a thin stroke width (e.g., 1.5) for a technical feel.
All interactive elements MUST have `data-testid` attributes (e.g., `data-testid="login-button"`).
Avoid standard Bootstrap/Tailwind blocky layouts. Emphasize bento grids and asymmetric overlap, following the E1 padding scale (generous spacing).
